jd_text: Multiple Hires: Deputy Head of Compliance & Compliance Manager Location: Dubai or Abu Dhabi Sector: FinTech (Digital Financial Services) Availability: Immediately Available OR 2 week's notice maximum. Overview We are partnering with a high-growth FinTech firm in the UAE, operating at the intersection of AI and financial services. As part of a strategic build-out, the firm is establishing a best-in-class Compliance function and is seeking both a Deputy Head of Compliance and a Compliance Manager to support this journey. These are hands-on roles suited to experienced generalist compliance professionals who can operate across advisory, monitoring, and regulatory engagement within a dynamic and evolving environment. Key Responsibilities: Regulatory & Advisory Provide day-to-day compliance advisory across the business, including product, operations, and technology teams Interpret and implement regulatory requirements under FSRA and CBUAE frameworks Support the development and launch of new products in line with applicable regulations Framework Development Assist in building and enhancing the Compliance framework, including policies, procedures, and controls Ensure alignment with UAE regulatory expectations and international best practices Contribute to the ongoing development of a scalable compliance infrastructure Monitoring & Testing Design and execute Compliance Monitoring Programmes (CMP) Conduct thematic reviews and control testing across key risk areas Track and report on remediation actions Regulatory Engagement Support interactions with regulators, including FSRA and CBUAE Assist in regulatory filings, reporting, and ongoing supervisory requirements Governance & Reporting Prepare management information (MI) and reports for senior management and governance committees Escalate key compliance risks and issues in a timely manner
